title: Lead and Lag Dependencies

posts.author: Stowl (Nicholas Lee)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello All,
I was looking up some ways to change dependencies and it seems like Monday has finally incorporated FS, SF, SS, and FF dependencies with lead and lag options:

https://support.monday.com/hc/en-us/articles/360007402599-Dependencies-on-monday-com

The site says it is gradually rolling out, and the gif shows that it is in beta. Is there a way to get the feature sooner or join the beta for it? I have already turned on all the beta options in monday.labs.

posts.author: tim753m (Tim Milner)
posts.cookedHtml: Thank goodness i have found someone else experiencing

posts.author: Sharyn829Ross (Sharyn829Ross)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello!
It’s great you’re excited for monday.com’s new advanced dependencies! Since you’ve already enabled all beta options in monday.labs and still don’t see it, it’s likely part of their controlled, gradual rollout and your account just hasn’t received it yet. Your best next step is to contact monday.com support directly to inquire about your account’s eligibility or estimated rollout time, as they’ll have the most precise information.

posts.author: Stowl (Nicholas Lee)
posts.cookedHtml: I was able to get the new dependencies and I get why it is still in beta. It has some interesting bugs. Where would be the best place to leave feedback?
